since_last: 80% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.45%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 80% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -1.18% · Gold +1.30% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 80% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.45%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.45%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TLN is the standout at +4.37%
cards.body: Leaders: TLN +4.37%, LRCX +4.21%, ASML +4.03%, CEVA +3.91%, AMD +3.82%. Laggards: DDOG -2.44%, HON -1.90%, BIDU -0.97%, EQIX -0.82%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.40% at $164.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.40% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
